title: California GOP lawmakers are incensed over a gas tax study. Rural groups say they need it
description: California’s gas is so radioactive, even a bill to study alternatives is fraught. Rural officials are frustrated over the partisan fight because their local industries depend on well-maintained roads.
content:
This story was originally published by CalMatters. Sign up for their newsletters.
For more than a month, Republican lawmakers in California have blasted a legislative proposal to study alternatives … [+11060 chars]
de: Die republikanischen Gesetzgeber in Kalifornien sind empört über eine Studie zur Gassteuer. Ländliche Gruppen sagen, dass sie es brauchen. Das kalifornische Gas ist so radioaktiv, dass sogar ein Gesetzentwurf zur Untersuchung von Alternativen heikel ist. Die ländlichen Beamten sind über den Partisanenkampf frustriert, da ihre lokale Industrie auf gut instand gehaltene Straßen angewiesen ist.
en: California GOP lawmakers are incensed over a gas tax study. Rural groups say they need it. California’s gas is so radioactive, even a bill to study alternatives is fraught. Rural officials are frustrated over the partisan fight because their local industries depend on well-maintained roads.
la: California GOP legumlatorum studium gasi tributum incensum est. Coetus rustici dicunt se egere. Gas radioactivum in California est, etiam rogatio ad alterum discendi plenum est. Magistratus rustici in pugna factionis frustrantur quod industriae locales eorum in viis bene conservatis pendent.

title: Snowbanks are still blocking parking on some streets more than a month after Toronto's last big storm
description: More than a month after Toronto's last major snowstorm, some residents are complaining their streets are still so clogged with curbside snowbanks that finding on-street parking remains a problem — not just for residents but local businesses too.
content: More than a month after Toronto's last major snowstorm, some residents are complaining their streets are still so clogged with curbside snowbanks that finding on-street parking remains a problem not … [+4431 chars]
de: Mehr als einen Monat nach dem letzten großen Sturm in Toronto blockieren Schneewehen immer noch das Parken auf einigen Straßen. Mehr als einen Monat nach dem letzten großen Schneesturm Torontos beschweren sich einige Anwohner, dass ihre Straßen immer noch so stark mit Schneewehen am Straßenrand verstopft sind, dass es immer noch ein Problem ist, Parkplätze auf der Straße zu finden – nicht nur für Anwohner, sondern auch für örtliche Unternehmen.
en: Snowbanks are still blocking parking on some streets more than a month after Toronto's last big storm. More than a month after Toronto's last major snowstorm, some residents are complaining their streets are still so clogged with curbside snowbanks that finding on-street parking remains a problem — not just for residents but local businesses too.
la: Snowbanks adhuc in viis quibusdam raedam claudunt plus quam mensem post Toronto novissimum magnum procellam. Plus quam mensem post Toronto postremum maioris nivis, aliqui incolas suas plateas queruntur adhuc tam impeditos nivibus curbsides ut invenientes in vicum raedam problema remaneat — non solum de habitantibus sed etiam negotiis localibus.

title: Denver records one of the driest, warmest Februarys on record
description: With only traces of snow falling in Denver in February, the city officially tied its record for the least-snowy February since 1882, according to the National Weather Service.
content:
Denver is on track to see the city’s driest winters on record after only traces of snow fell in February, according to the National Weather Service.
Roughly 13.4 inches of snow fell in the Denver ar… [+1955 chars]
de: Denver verzeichnet einen der trockensten und wärmsten Februar seit Beginn der Aufzeichnungen. Da im Februar in Denver nur Spuren von Schnee fielen, stellte die Stadt nach Angaben des National Weather Service offiziell ihren Rekord für den schneeärmsten Februar seit 1882 ein.
en: Denver records one of the driest, warmest Februarys on record. With only traces of snow falling in Denver in February, the city officially tied its record for the least-snowy February since 1882, according to the National Weather Service.
la: Denver unum ex aridissimis Februariis calidissimis memoriae proditum est. Cum sola vestigia nivis in Denver mense Februario cadentis, urbs publice tabulam suam nivalem Februario ab anno 1882 minimum ligavit, secundum servitii Tempestatis Nationalis.

title: And Just Like That, Winter Dragged Us Harder Than We Ever Dragged Carrie Bradshaw
description: Honestly, we’re all Carrie Bradshaw and we need to stop pretending we’re not. First snowfall? We’re her. Bundled up in something ridiculous, romanticizing the whole thing, calling our best friend like, “It’s SNOWING. Isn’t this magical?
content:
Honestly, we’re all Carrie Bradshaw and we need to stop pretending we’re not.
First snowfall? We’re her. Bundled up in something ridiculous, romanticizing the whole thing, calling our best friend li… [+1357 chars]
de: Und einfach so hat uns der Winter stärker in Mitleidenschaft gezogen, als wir es je mit Carrie Bradshaw zu tun hatten. Ehrlich gesagt sind wir alle Carrie Bradshaw und wir müssen aufhören, so zu tun, als wären wir es nicht. Erster Schneefall? Wir sind sie. In etwas Lächerliches gehüllt, das Ganze romantisierend, unseren besten Freund rufend: „Es schneit. Ist das nicht magisch?“
en: And Just Like That, Winter Dragged Us Harder Than We Ever Dragged Carrie Bradshaw. Honestly, we’re all Carrie Bradshaw and we need to stop pretending we’re not. First snowfall? We’re her. Bundled up in something ridiculous, romanticizing the whole thing, calling our best friend like, “It’s SNOWING. Isn’t this magical?
la: Ac velut id, hyeme, nos duriores Traximus quam nos semper Traximus Carrie Bradshaw. Honeste omnes Carrie Bradshaw sumus et simulantes nos non sumus prohibere necesse est. Primum nix? Nos eius sumus. In ridiculo quodam involutus, rem totam romanticizing vocans amicum nostrum similem, “Ninguit. Estne haec magica?

title: High-tech snowplows and AI help cities clean up from big storms
description: Cities across the U.S. have been integrating video monitoring, GPS mapping and artificial intelligence into snow removal operations that once relied almost entirely on manual planning.

en: High-tech snowplows and AI help cities clean up from big storms. Cities across the U.S. have been integrating video monitoring, GPS mapping and artificial intelligence into snow removal operations that once relied almost entirely on manual planning.
la: Summus tech nivis et AI, civitates adiuvant mundas a magnis procellis. Urbes per Americae integrare video vigilantiam, GPS destinata et artificiosa intelligentia in operas remotionis nivis quae olim in consilio manuali fere omnino nitebantur.

title: AI that you can get behind: Syracuse claims snow complaints have dropped 30% since it partnered with the right GPS tech firm
description: “Rather than having to sift through a list of vehicles, it can actually figure this out: ‘We've got Trevor in vehicle 203, 15 minutes away.'"
content: Residents of Syracuse, New York Americas snowiest city once barraged a service hotline with street neglect complaints during blizzards, even if plows had passed two hours earlier but the work was hid… [+4828 chars]
de: KI, die Sie unterstützen können: Syracuse behauptet, die Schneebeschwerden seien um 30 % zurückgegangen, seit das Unternehmen mit dem richtigen GPS-Technologieunternehmen zusammengearbeitet habe. „Anstatt eine Liste von Fahrzeugen durchsuchen zu müssen, kann es tatsächlich Folgendes herausfinden: ‚Wir haben Trevor im Fahrzeug 203, 15 Minuten entfernt.‘“
en: AI that you can get behind: Syracuse claims snow complaints have dropped 30% since it partnered with the right GPS tech firm. “Rather than having to sift through a list of vehicles, it can actually figure this out: ‘We've got Trevor in vehicle 203, 15 minutes away.'"
la: AI ut post tergum possis: Syracusae querelas nives demiserunt 30% quia communicavit cum iure GPS tech firma. "potius quam per indicem vehiculorum cribrare habendo, hoc vere figurare potest: "Trevor in vehiculo 203, 15 minutas pervenimus"".

title: High-tech snowplows and AI help U.S. cities clean up from big storms
description: America’s snowiest city — once barraged a service hotline with street neglect complaints during blizzards, even if plows had passed two hours earlier but the work was hidden by fresh snow. Now public trust seems to be rising as Syracuse and other cities acros…
content:

Now public t… [+4966 chars]

Amerikas schneereichste Stadt – einst wurde eine Service-Hotline während eines Schneesturms mit Beschwerden über Straßenvernachlässigung bombardiert, auch wenn die Schneepflüge bereits zwei Stunden zuvor vorbeigefahren waren, die Arbeit jedoch durch Neuschnee verdeckt wurde. Civitas Americae nivalis — olim officium hotline cum platea negligentiae querelarum in blizzards praestruxerat, etiam si aratra duabus horis ante transierant, sed opus recentibus nivibus latebat. Nunc publica fides oriri videtur, sicut Syracusae et aliae urbes acros.
